Class EfsFeed<E extends IEfsEvent>

java.lang.Object
org.efs.feed.EfsFeed<E>
Type Parameters:
E - efs event type.
All Implemented Interfaces:
IEfsAgent
public final class EfsFeed<E extends IEfsEvent> extends Object implements IEfsAgent
Responsible for storing and forwarding efs events.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

    static final int
    DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_EVENT_QUEUE_CAPACITY
    Default efs feed dispatcher event queue capacity is 512.
    static final int
    DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_MAX_EVENTS
    Default efs feed dispatcher may process up to 32 events at a time.

    Default efs feed dispatcher is named "__DefaultFeedDispatcher__".

    DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_PRIORITY
    Default efs feed dispatcher priority is 5.

    Default efs feed dispatcher run queue capacity is 65536.

    Default efs feed dispatcher thread count is 4.

    Default efs feed dispatcher thread type is ThreadType.BLOCKING.

  • Field Details

    • DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_NAME

      public static final String DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_NAME
      Default efs feed dispatcher is named "__DefaultFeedDispatcher__". This dispatcher is configured as follows:
      • thread count: DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_THREAD_COUNT.
      • thread type: DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_THREAD_TYPE.
      • thread priority: DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_PRIORITY.
      • event queue capacity: DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_EVENT_QUEUE_CAPACITY.
      • maximum events per callout: DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_MAX_EVENTS.
      • run queue capacity: DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_RUN_QUEUE_LIMIT.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_THREAD_COUNT

      public static final int DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_THREAD_COUNT
      Default efs feed dispatcher thread count is 4.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_THREAD_TYPE

      public static final ThreadType DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_THREAD_TYPE
      Default efs feed dispatcher thread type is ThreadType.BLOCKING.

    • DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_PRIORITY

      public static final int DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_PRIORITY
      Default efs feed dispatcher priority is 5.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_EVENT_QUEUE_CAPACITY

      public static final int DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_EVENT_QUEUE_CAPACITY
      Default efs feed dispatcher event queue capacity is 512.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_MAX_EVENTS

      public static final int DEFAULT_DISPATCHER_MAX_EVENTS
      Default efs feed dispatcher may process up to 32 events at a time.
      See Also:

  • Method Details

    • name

      public String name()
      Returns EfsFeedKey.toString() as dispatcher name.
      Specified by:
      name in interface IEfsAgent
      Returns:
      efs feed key as text.

    • key

      public EfsFeedKey<E> key()
      Returns key containing event class and subject.
      Returns:
      feed key.

    • setFeedDispatcher

      public static <E extends IEfsEvent> void setFeedDispatcher(Class<E> eventClass, String dispatcherName)
      Maps efs event class to efs dispatcher used for feeds for that event class. This method requires the named dispatcher already exists before calling this method.

      Note: if eventClass is already in the feed dispatcher map, then its existing dispatcher mapping will be overridden - if this method call successfully returns.

      Type Parameters:
      E - efs event type.
      Parameters:
      eventClass - efs event class.
      dispatcherName - efs dispatcher name.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if eventClass is null.
      IllegalArgumentException - if dispatcherName is either null, an empty string, or is an unknown dispatcher.

    • setFeedDispatchers

      public static void setFeedDispatchers(Map<Class<? extends IEfsEvent>, String> dispatchers)
      Places given event class-to-dispatcher name mappings into internal mappings. This method first validates given mappings for correctness before placing any of these given mappings into internal set. In short, either all of given mappings are placed into internal set or none.

      Note: if dispatchers contains event class keys already in the internal mappings, then these new mappings replace existing mappings.

      Parameters:
      dispatchers - contains efs event class-to-dispatcher name mappings.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if either dispatchers is null or contains null Class keys.
      IllegalArgumentException - if dispatchers contains dispatcher name values which are either null, an empty string, or is unknown to EfsDispatcher.

    • publish

      public void publish(E event)
      Posts given event to feed and forwards event to active subscribers. Feed uses Instant.now() as event timestamp since it does not assume that event has its own timestamp.
      Parameters:
      event - publish event and forward to event to active subscribers.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if event is null.

    • subscribe

      public EfsSubscription<E> subscribe(IEfsAgent subscriber, Consumer<E> eventCallback, EfsInterval interval)
      Posts given subscriber and subscription interval to dispatcher thread and returns closable subscription instance.
      Parameters:
      subscriber - forward events to this subscriber.
      eventCallback - forward events to subscriber via this lambda callback.
      interval - subscription interval.
      Returns:
      closable event subscription.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if subscriber, eventCallback, or interval is null.

    • openFeed

      public static <E extends IEfsEvent> EfsFeed<E> openFeed(EfsFeedKey<E> key)
      Returns efs feed associated with the given feed key. If there is no such feed, then creates feed and registers that feed with dispatcher associated with EfsFeedKey.eventClass(). If there is no such association, then uses default efs feed dispatcher.
      Type Parameters:
      E - efs event type.
      Parameters:
      key - efs feed key.
      Returns:
      efs feed for given feed key.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if key is null.
